title: Lunar Collection
description: a collection of LES (Lunar Eclipse Studios) content
body:
This pack is a compilation of stuff that Lunar Eclipse Studios and affiliated people have made including the popular Herobrine mod: From The Fog

this packs also includes stuff like:
a year cycle that each month that has a positive or negative effect on you your world.
terraria's demon eyes spawns in your world.
your pets can respawn now.
![made by Comicalbonzo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d79da4c4846da88007bc090ffbfa43dd6d52d60e_0.webp)

everything is darker and has some items with dynamic lights,

and build in shaders and resourcepacks

also wanna re-iterate that this is NOT a horror focused pack
